evidence: The paper focuses exclusively on predictive performance evaluation using cross-validated C-index values. It states: "Using 20 publicly available multi-omics data sets with survival outcome we compared the prediction performances of the block forest variants with alternatives" and "BlockForest performed significantly better than RSF (adjusted p-value: 0.027)." The primary contribution is modifying random forest split selection for multi-omics data structure, not interpreting variable or feature importance.
